## Checklist

- [ ] Read the [Contributing Guidelines](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Checked there isn't already a PR for this
- [ ] Ran `bun run check && bun run check:types && bun run knip && bun test`
- [ ] Added a [changeset](https://github.com/changesets/changesets) if this includes user-facing changes
